(* ============================================================ *)
(* PROGRAM: ST_06_SERVO                                        *)
(* DESC:    Servo 1-axis position control (index rotation)     *)
(*          Slot 9, Axis 0 — 12-station 30-degree index        *)
(*          Home return, standby position, jog, alarm handling *)
(* SOURCE:  06_SERVO.txt (XG5000 mnemonic — LS PLC XG5000)    *)
(* TARGET:  XEC IEC 61131-3 Structured Text + MC_ FB           *)
(* DATE:    2026-03-16                                         *)
(* ============================================================ *)
(*                                                              *)
(* LS PLC -> XEC MC_ function block mapping:                   *)
(*   GET(9,h0140,D05000,2) -> read _MC_AX[0].Status etc.       *)
(*   DST(9,0,pos,speed,0,0,h0010) -> MC_MoveAbsolute           *)
(*   ORG(9,0) -> MC_Home                                       *)
(*   PRS(9,0,0) -> MC_SetPosition                              *)
(*   CLR(9,0,1) -> MC_Reset                                    *)
(*   EMG(9,0) -> MC_Stop (with EmergencyStop mode)             *)
(*   THP(9,0,D05052,10/11) -> MC_Jog (with velocity)          *)
(*                                                              *)
(* XEC system variable prefix: _MC_AX[0].                      *)
(*   .Status       -> D05000 word (axis status bits)           *)
(*   .IsHomed      -> D05000.4 (origin complete)               *)
(*   .Error        -> D05000.1 (axis error)                    *)
(*   .IsMoving     -> D05000.0 (motion active)                 *)
(*   .InPosition   -> D05000.2 (position complete)             *)
(*   .ExtIO        -> D05002  (external I/O word)              *)
(*   .ActualPosition -> D05004 DWORD (current position)        *)
(*   .ActualVelocity -> D05006 DWORD (current speed)           *)
(*   .ErrorID      -> D05008 (error code)                      *)
(* ============================================================ *)

PROGRAM ST_06_SERVO

VAR
    (* -------------------------------------------------------- *)
    (* MC_ function block instances                             *)
    (* -------------------------------------------------------- *)
    FB_Home        : MC_Home;           (* ORG -> home return *)
    FB_MoveAbs     : MC_MoveAbsolute;   (* DST -> standby position move *)
    FB_MoveIdx     : MC_MoveAbsolute;   (* DST -> index 30-degree rotation *)
    FB_SetPos      : MC_SetPosition;    (* PRS -> position preset to 0 *)
    FB_Reset       : MC_Reset;          (* CLR -> alarm clear *)
    FB_Stop        : MC_Stop;           (* EMG -> emergency stop *)
    FB_JogCW       : MC_Jog;            (* THP+dir10 -> CW jog *)
    FB_JogCCW      : MC_Jog;            (* THP+dir11 -> CCW jog *)

    (* -------------------------------------------------------- *)
    (* timers (same numbering as original ladder)               *)
    (* -------------------------------------------------------- *)
    TON_T0006  : TON;   (* index rotation timeout alarm 40ms *)
    TON_T0007  : TON;   (* servo in-position NG check 5ms *)
    TON_T0008  : TON;   (* position complete while not in-pos 5ms *)
    TON_T0009  : TON;   (* standby move trigger delay 2ms *)
    TON_T0012  : TON;   (* dry-run pulse 4ms *)
    TON_T0050  : TON;   (* index complete delay 1 — 30ms *)
    TON_T0051  : TON;   (* index complete delay 2 — 20ms *)
    TON_T0082  : TON;   (* home command delay 10ms *)
    TON_T0083  : TON;   (* home command execute delay 11ms *)

    (* -------------------------------------------------------- *)
    (* FB execute one-shot flags                                *)
    (* -------------------------------------------------------- *)
    bHomeExec      : BOOL := FALSE;
    bMovAbsExec    : BOOL := FALSE;
    bMovIdxExec    : BOOL := FALSE;
    bSetPosExec    : BOOL := FALSE;
    bResetExec     : BOOL := FALSE;
    bStopExec      : BOOL := FALSE;
    bJogCWExec     : BOOL := FALSE;
    bJogCCWExec    : BOOL := FALSE;

    (* -------------------------------------------------------- *)
    (* edge detection previous values                           *)
    (* -------------------------------------------------------- *)
    M0001B_prev    : BOOL := FALSE;   (* servo rotation pulse *)
    M0001C_prev    : BOOL := FALSE;   (* position reset request *)
    M0001F_prev    : BOOL := FALSE;   (* system reset *)
    M00030_prev    : BOOL := FALSE;   (* EMO *)
    M00102_prev    : BOOL := FALSE;   (* standby move command *)
    M00103_prev    : BOOL := FALSE;   (* index rotation command *)
    M0011F_prev    : BOOL := FALSE;   (* servo not homed *)
    K00116_prev    : BOOL := FALSE;   (* home touch *)
    K00118_prev    : BOOL := FALSE;   (* manual index touch *)
    T0083_prev     : BOOL := FALSE;   (* home execute delay Q *)
    D05000_2_prev  : BOOL := FALSE;   (* InPosition rising *)
    D05000_4_prev  : BOOL := FALSE;   (* IsHomed rising *)
    U09_01_0_prev  : BOOL := FALSE;   (* CW jog rising *)
    U09_01_1_prev  : BOOL := FALSE;   (* CCW jog rising *)
END_VAR


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 0: servo rotation interlock — all units ready check    *)
(* Various unit completion bits -> overall interlock           *)
(* M01316, M0131A, M02316, M03316, M04314, M04316             *)
(* M05310, M06314, M0631A, M0631C, M06320                     *)
(* M07316, M0731A, M0731C, M07322                             *)
(* AND M00311(nest clamp fwd) AND M08003 AND M08316            *)
(* AND M00315(conduction OK) AND M01987(module OK)             *)
(* -> M00150 (servo rotation allowed flag)                     *)
(* ============================================================ *)
M00150 := (M01316 OR M0131A)
        AND (M02316 OR M02316)
        AND (M03316 OR M03316)
        AND (M04314 OR M04316)
        AND (M05310 OR M05310)
        AND (M06314 OR M0631A OR M0631C OR M06320)
        AND (M07316 OR M0731A OR M0731C OR M07322)
        AND M00311    (* nest clamp advanced *)
        AND M08003
        AND M08316
        AND M00315    (* conduction test OK *)
        AND M01987;   (* special module OK *)


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 30: servo rotation enable condition (M00050)           *)
(* P0000F(area sensor) AND M00150 AND M01987 AND M00320(dry)   *)
(* ============================================================ *)
M00050 := P0000F AND M00150 AND M01987 AND M00320;


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 38: servo rotation pulse rising edge -> SET M00051     *)
(* M0001B P (rising) -> M00051                                 *)
(* ============================================================ *)
IF M0001B AND NOT M0001B_prev THEN
    M00051 := TRUE;   (* servo rotation trigger *)
END_IF;


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 41: servo motion active flag (M00053)                  *)
(* D05000.0 (_MC_AX[0].IsMoving) -> M00053                    *)
(* ============================================================ *)
D05000_0 := _MC_AX[0].IsMoving;
M00053   := D05000_0;


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 43: position complete rising edge -> SET M00055        *)
(* D05000.2 (_MC_AX[0].InPosition) P -> SET M00055            *)
(* ============================================================ *)
D05000_2 := _MC_AX[0].InPosition;
IF D05000_2 AND NOT D05000_2_prev THEN
    M00055 := TRUE;   (* servo rotation complete SET *)
END_IF;


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 46: motion start -> RST M00055                         *)
(* D05000.0 (IsMoving) -> RST M00055                          *)
(* ============================================================ *)
IF D05000_0 THEN
    M00055 := FALSE;
END_IF;


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 48: servo ON lamp                                      *)
(* M00300 -> K0111A (HMI servo-ON lamp)                       *)
(* ============================================================ *)
K0111A := M00300;


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 50: home complete lamp                                  *)
(* M00101 OR D05001_5 -> K01116                               *)
(* D05001_5 = _MC_AX[0].IsHoming (in-progress)                *)
(* ============================================================ *)
D05000_1 := _MC_AX[0].Error;
D05000_4 := _MC_AX[0].IsHomed;
D05001_5 := _MC_AX[0].IsHoming;
K01116   := M00101 OR D05001_5;


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 55: index rotation lamp                                *)
(* D05000.0 (IsMoving) -> K01118                              *)
(* ============================================================ *)
K01118 := D05000_0;


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 57: dry-run pulse timer                                *)
(* M00307 AND M01987 AND NOT T0012 AND M00320 -> TON T0012 4ms*)
(* ============================================================ *)
TON_T0012(IN := M00307 AND M01987 AND NOT T0012 AND M00320, PT := T#4ms);
T0012 := TON_T0012.Q;


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 67: servo status read (GET -> XEC system variables)    *)
(* GET(9, h0140, D05000, 2) — axis status 2 words             *)
(* GET(9, h0143, D05002, 1) — external I/O 1 word             *)
(* GET(9, h0144, D05004, 2) — actual position DWORD           *)
(* GET(9, h0146, D05006, 2) — actual speed DWORD              *)
(* GET(9, h014A, D05008, 1) — error code 1 word               *)
(*                                                              *)
(* XEC: read directly from _MC_AX[0] system variables         *)
(* ============================================================ *)
(* Status word mirror — bit-decomposed for compatibility *)
D05000_0 := _MC_AX[0].IsMoving;       (* bit 0: motion active *)
D05000_1 := _MC_AX[0].Error;          (* bit 1: axis error *)
D05000_2 := _MC_AX[0].InPosition;     (* bit 2: position complete *)
D05000_4 := _MC_AX[0].IsHomed;        (* bit 4: origin complete *)
D05001_5 := _MC_AX[0].IsHoming;       (* status word2 bit5: homing *)

(* D05002: external I/O word — read from axis external I/O register *)
(* TODO: map _MC_AX[0] external I/O bits to D05002 if available *)

(* D05004: actual position DWORD (unit: 0.01 deg = 100 units/deg) *)
D05004 := LREAL_TO_DINT(_MC_AX[0].ActualPosition);

(* D05006: actual speed DWORD *)
D05006 := LREAL_TO_DINT(_MC_AX[0].ActualVelocity);

(* D05008: error code *)
D05008 := _MC_AX[0].ErrorID;

(* Scale actual position: /100 -> degrees (DDIV D05004/100->D05014) *)
D05014 := D05004 / 100;
IF D05014 < 0 THEN
    D05014 := 0;   (* clip negative (D> 0 D05014 -> DMOV 0 D05014) *)
END_IF;


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 98: position preset on M0001C rising edge              *)
(* M0001C P -> PRS(9,0,0) : MC_SetPosition to 0               *)
(* ============================================================ *)
IF M0001C AND NOT M0001C_prev THEN
    bSetPosExec := TRUE;
    M00900      := TRUE;   (* preset executing flag *)
END_IF;

FB_SetPos(
    Axis     := _MC_AX[0],
    Execute  := bSetPosExec,
    Position := 0.0,        (* preset current position to 0 *)
    Mode     := 0           (* absolute preset *)
);
IF FB_SetPos.Done OR FB_SetPos.Error THEN
    bSetPosExec := FALSE;
    M00900      := FALSE;
END_IF;

(* Rung 106: M00901 -> EPRS confirm (XEC: Done flag handles this) *)
M00901 := FB_SetPos.Done;


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 112: position >= 3600 (36 full turns) -> request reset *)
(* M00055 AND D05014>=3600 AND NOT M0001C AND NOT M00122       *)
(* ============================================================ *)
IF M00055 AND (D05014 >= 3600) AND NOT M0001C AND NOT M00122 THEN
    M0001C := TRUE;
ELSE
    M0001C := FALSE;
END_IF;


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 119: servo not-homed flag                              *)
(* D05000.1 (Error) -> M0011F                                  *)
(* NOTE: in XEC, axis error bit replaces LS "origin incomplete"*)
(* ============================================================ *)
M0011F := D05000_1;   (* servo not homed / axis error *)


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 123: home return sequence                              *)
(* Condition: NOT M00302 AND NOT M00101 AND M00300 AND M00050  *)
(*            AND M0011F AND NOT D05000_0                      *)
(*            AND K00116 rising edge                            *)
(* -> SET M00100, then trigger MC_Home                         *)
(* ============================================================ *)
IF NOT M00302 AND NOT M00101 AND M00300 AND M00050
   AND M0011F AND NOT D05000_0 THEN
    IF K00116 AND NOT K00116_prev THEN
        M00100 := TRUE;   (* home return start SET *)
    END_IF;
END_IF;

(* alternate: K00116 rising alone also available *)
IF K00116 AND NOT K00116_prev THEN
    ;   (* already handled above *)
END_IF;


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 135: home return execute via T0082/T0083 delay         *)
(* M00100 -> TON T0082 10ms, TON T0083 11ms                   *)
(* T0083 rising edge -> ORG(9,0) : MC_Home Execute             *)
(* RST M00100                                                  *)
(* ============================================================ *)
TON_T0082(IN := M00100, PT := T#10ms);
T0082 := TON_T0082.Q;

TON_T0083(IN := M00100, PT := T#11ms);
T0083 := TON_T0083.Q;

IF T0083 AND NOT T0083_prev THEN
    bHomeExec := TRUE;    (* trigger MC_Home — ORG(9,0) *)
    M00100    := FALSE;   (* clear home request *)
END_IF;

(* MC_Home function block call — replaces ORG(9,0) *)
FB_Home(
    Axis        := _MC_AX[0],
    Execute     := bHomeExec,
    HomingMode  := 0        (* homing mode: use axis parameter default *)
);
IF FB_Home.Done THEN
    bHomeExec := FALSE;
    D05000_4  := TRUE;    (* force IsHomed reflect *)
END_IF;
IF FB_Home.Error THEN
    bHomeExec := FALSE;
    M00301    := TRUE;    (* home error flag *)
END_IF;


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 146: home complete confirmation                         *)
(* D05000.4 (IsHomed) rising -> SET M00300, SET M00101        *)
(* D05000.1 (Error) -> RST M00101                              *)
(* ============================================================ *)
IF D05000_4 AND NOT D05000_4_prev THEN
    M00300 := TRUE;    (* servo ON confirm *)
    M00101 := TRUE;    (* home complete SET *)
END_IF;

IF D05000_1 THEN
    M00101 := FALSE;   (* axis error -> home incomplete *)
END_IF;


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 156: servo jog operation                               *)
(* K00190 AND NOT M00030 AND M00050 -> U09.01.0 (CW jog)      *)
(* K00191 AND NOT M00030 AND M00050 -> U09.01.1 (CCW jog)     *)
(* AND NOT M00100 AND NOT T0082 (not during home sequence)     *)
(* ============================================================ *)
bJogCWExec  := K00190 AND NOT M00030 AND M00050
               AND NOT M00100 AND NOT T0082;
bJogCCWExec := K00191 AND NOT M00030 AND M00050
               AND NOT M00100 AND NOT T0082;

U09_01_0 := bJogCWExec;    (* CW jog status mirror -> HMI lamp *)
U09_01_1 := bJogCCWExec;   (* CCW jog status mirror -> HMI lamp *)

(* Rung 167: jog HMI lamps *)
K01190 := U09_01_0;
K01191 := U09_01_1;

(* Rung 172: THP -> set jog speed on rising edge of jog start *)
(* THP(9,0,D05052,10) CW jog speed set                       *)
(* THP(9,0,D05052,11) CCW jog speed set                      *)
(* XEC: MC_Jog uses Velocity parameter directly               *)

(* MC_Jog CW — replaces THP(9,0,D05052,10) + U09.01.0 *)
FB_JogCW(
    Axis      := _MC_AX[0],
    JogForward := bJogCWExec,
    JogBackward := FALSE,
    Velocity  := DINT_TO_LREAL(D05052)   (* D05052 = jog speed in unit *)
);

(* MC_Jog CCW — replaces THP(9,0,D05052,11) + U09.01.1 *)
FB_JogCCW(
    Axis      := _MC_AX[0],
    JogForward := FALSE,
    JogBackward := bJogCCWExec,
    Velocity  := DINT_TO_LREAL(D05052)
);


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 187: standby position move                             *)
(* Condition: NOT M00302 AND M00101 AND M00050                 *)
(*            AND NOT M00122(not yet at standby)               *)
(*            AND NOT M00102(not already moving)               *)
(* -> TON T0009 2ms -> trigger MC_MoveAbsolute (standby)      *)
(* ============================================================ *)
TON_T0009(IN := NOT M00302 AND M00101 AND M00050
               AND NOT M00122 AND NOT M00102,
          PT := T#2ms);
T0009 := TON_T0009.Q;

(* Rung 197: T0009 Q -> SET M00102, then execute DST *)
IF T0009 AND NOT M00102 THEN
    M00102 := TRUE;
END_IF;

IF M00102 AND NOT M00102_prev
   AND NOT D05000_0 AND NOT D05000_1 THEN
    bMovAbsExec := TRUE;   (* DST(9,0,D05300,D05400,0,0,h0010) *)
END_IF;

(* MC_MoveAbsolute — replaces DST(9,0,D05300,D05400,0,0,h0010) *)
(* D05300 = standby position (DINT), D05400 = standby speed    *)
FB_MoveAbs(
    Axis         := _MC_AX[0],
    Execute      := bMovAbsExec,
    Position     := DINT_TO_LREAL(D05300),   (* standby position *)
    Velocity     := DINT_TO_LREAL(D05400),   (* standby speed *)
    Acceleration := 0.0,
    Deceleration := 0.0,
    Direction    := MC_Positive_Direction     (* h0010 = positive direction *)
);
IF FB_MoveAbs.Done OR FB_MoveAbs.Error THEN
    bMovAbsExec := FALSE;
END_IF;

(* Rung 208: standby move in progress -> SET M00121 *)
IF M00102 THEN
    M00121 := TRUE;
END_IF;

(* Rung 210: standby reached -> RST M00121 *)
IF M00122 THEN
    M00121 := FALSE;
END_IF;

(* Rung 212: M00121 AND InPosition -> SET M00122 (standby reached) *)
IF M00121 AND D05000_2 THEN
    M00122 := TRUE;   (* standby position reached SET *)
END_IF;

(* Rung 215: standby reset conditions *)
IF NOT M00101 THEN
    M00122 := FALSE;   (* axis error or not homed -> clear standby *)
END_IF;
IF D05000_4 AND NOT D05000_4_prev THEN
    M00122 := FALSE;   (* after home complete -> require new standby move *)
END_IF;
IF T0083 THEN
    M00122 := FALSE;   (* home sequence started -> clear standby flag *)
END_IF;
IF NOT M00030 AND NOT F0009A THEN   (* EMO released *)
    M00122 := FALSE;
    M00102 := FALSE;   (* clear move command too *)
END_IF;

(* Clear M00102 when NOT M00300 OR axis error OR home in progress *)
IF D05000_4 AND NOT D05000_4_prev THEN
    M00102 := FALSE;
END_IF;


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 226: 12-station 30-degree index rotation               *)
(* Auto: M00010 AND M00122 AND M0001B rising AND M00050        *)
(*       AND NOT M00103 (not already rotating)                  *)
(* Manual: M00011 AND M00122 AND K00118 rising AND NOT T0051   *)
(* -> SET M00103, then execute DST(9,0,D05302,D05402,...)      *)
(* ============================================================ *)

(* Rung 226 auto index condition *)
IF M00010 AND M00122 AND M0001B AND NOT M0001B_prev
   AND M00050 AND NOT M00103 THEN
    M00103 := TRUE;   (* index rotation command SET *)
END_IF;

(* Rung 226 manual index via K00118 touch *)
IF M00011 AND M00122 AND K00118 AND NOT K00118_prev
   AND NOT T0051 THEN
    M00103 := TRUE;
END_IF;

(* Rung 239: M00103 rising -> DST(9,0,D05302,D05402,0,0,h0010) *)
IF M00103 AND NOT M00103_prev
   AND NOT D05000_0 AND NOT D05000_1
   AND NOT M00300 AND NOT T0006 THEN
    bMovIdxExec := TRUE;   (* index rotation move execute *)
END_IF;

(* MC_MoveAbsolute — replaces DST(9,0,D05302,D05402,0,0,h0010) *)
(* D05302 = index target position, D05402 = index rotation speed *)
FB_MoveIdx(
    Axis         := _MC_AX[0],
    Execute      := bMovIdxExec,
    Position     := DINT_TO_LREAL(D05302),   (* index rotation position *)
    Velocity     := DINT_TO_LREAL(D05402),   (* index rotation speed *)
    Acceleration := 0.0,
    Deceleration := 0.0,
    Direction    := MC_Positive_Direction     (* h0010 = positive direction *)
);
IF FB_MoveIdx.Done OR FB_MoveIdx.Error THEN
    bMovIdxExec := FALSE;
    M00103      := FALSE;   (* clear rotation command on complete *)
END_IF;


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 252: index rotation alarm timer                        *)
(* M00053(IsMoving) -> TON T0006 40ms (rotation timeout)      *)
(* P00056 AND M00010 -> TON T0007 5ms (in-position NG)        *)
(* D05000.2 AND P00056 AND M00010 -> TON T0008 5ms            *)
(* ============================================================ *)
TON_T0006(IN := M00053, PT := T#40ms);
T0006 := TON_T0006.Q;   (* rotation timeout alarm *)

TON_T0007(IN := P00056 AND M00010, PT := T#5ms);
T0007 := TON_T0007.Q;   (* servo in-position NG *)

(* Rung 259: position complete while P00056 sensor present *)
TON_T0008(IN := D05000_2 AND P00056 AND M00010, PT := T#5ms);
T0008 := TON_T0008.Q;


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 264: index complete delay chain                        *)
(* M00995 AND M00171 AND M00055 AND NOT T0051 -> TON T0050 30ms*)
(* T0050 -> TON T0051 20ms                                     *)
(* ============================================================ *)
TON_T0050(IN := M00995 AND M00171 AND M00055 AND NOT T0051, PT := T#30ms);
T0050 := TON_T0050.Q;

TON_T0051(IN := T0050, PT := T#20ms);
T0051 := TON_T0051.Q;


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 276: servo alarm clear (CLR -> MC_Reset)               *)
(* D05000.1(Error) AND M0001F(reset) -> CLR(9,0,1) : MC_Reset *)
(* ============================================================ *)
IF D05000_1 AND M0001F THEN
    bResetExec := TRUE;   (* CLR(9,0,1) -> MC_Reset *)
    M00301     := TRUE;
END_IF;

(* MC_Reset — replaces CLR(9,0,1) *)
FB_Reset(
    Axis    := _MC_AX[0],
    Execute := bResetExec
);
IF FB_Reset.Done OR FB_Reset.Error THEN
    bResetExec := FALSE;
    IF FB_Reset.Done THEN
        M00301 := FALSE;   (* reset complete *)
    END_IF;
END_IF;


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 283: emergency stop (EMG -> MC_Stop)                   *)
(* M00030(EMO) -> EMG(9,0) : MC_Stop                          *)
(* M0011F rising, T0007, T0008, M00005, NOT M00300 also stop  *)
(* ============================================================ *)
bStopExec := M00030
           OR (T0007)
           OR (T0008)
           OR (M0011F AND NOT M0011F_prev)
           OR (NOT M00300 AND M00005);

(* MC_Stop — replaces EMG(9,0) *)
FB_Stop(
    Axis         := _MC_AX[0],
    Execute      := bStopExec,
    Deceleration := 0.0,    (* use axis parameter default *)
    Jerk         := 0.0
);
(* After stop complete, clear bStopExec only if EMO released  *)
IF FB_Stop.Done AND NOT M00030 THEN
    bStopExec := FALSE;
END_IF;

(* T0007 or T0008 alarm -> set alarm bits *)
IF T0007 OR T0008 THEN
    M00005  := TRUE;    (* servo position alarm *)
    M00300  := FALSE;   (* servo ON cancel *)
END_IF;

(* EMO solenoid RST — safety interlock: nest clamp must also RST *)
IF M00030 THEN
    (* EMO active: ensure solenoid outputs are suppressed *)
    (* Individual unit SOL outputs already gated by M01987/M00010 *)
    ;
END_IF;


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 293: servo parameter calculation (always executed)     *)
(* DMUL: D05050(touch) * 100 -> D05052 (jog speed pulse unit) *)
(* DMUL: D05100(touch) * 10  -> D05300 (standby position)     *)
(* DMUL: D05200(touch) * 100 -> D05400 (standby speed)        *)
(* DMUL: D05102(touch) * 1000 -> D05302 (index position)      *)
(* DMUL: D05202(touch) * 100  -> D05402 (index speed)         *)
(* ============================================================ *)
D05052 := D05050 * 100;    (* jog speed: touch input * 100 -> pulse/sec *)
D05300 := D05100 * 10;     (* standby position: touch * 10 -> units *)
D05400 := D05200 * 100;    (* standby speed: touch * 100 -> units/sec *)
D05302 := D05102 * 1000;   (* index position: touch * 1000 -> units *)
D05402 := D05202 * 100;    (* index speed: touch * 100 -> units/sec *)


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Edge detection update — must be last in scan               *)
(* ============================================================ *)
M0001B_prev   := M0001B;
M0001C_prev   := M0001C;
M0001F_prev   := M0001F;
M00030_prev   := M00030;
M00102_prev   := M00102;
M00103_prev   := M00103;
M0011F_prev   := M0011F;
K00116_prev   := K00116;
K00118_prev   := K00118;
T0083_prev    := T0083;
D05000_2_prev := D05000_2;
D05000_4_prev := D05000_4;
U09_01_0_prev := U09_01_0;
U09_01_1_prev := U09_01_1;

END_PROGRAM

lines: T0083_prev     : BOOL := FALSE;   (* home execute delay Q *)
-    U09_01_0_prev  : BOOL := FALSE;   (* CW jog rising *)
+    bJogCW_prev  : BOOL := FALSE;   (* CW jog rising *)
U09_01_1_prev  : BOOL := FALSE;   (* CCW jog rising *)

message.content:
This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   The user requested implementation of a comprehensive plan to convert a PLC ladder program from LS XBC-DN64H to XEC-DN64H ST (Structured Text) for a "1 CELL 조립 장비" (1 CELL Assembly Machine) at Shinjin. The plan had 4 phases:
   - Phase 1: Split original ladder text into 17 individual block files
   - Phase 2: Create 3 conversion documentation files (XBC→XEC guide, I/O allocation table, program structure diagram)
   - Phase 3: Create 5 GVL files + 17 ST program files (including 2 NEW spring blocks ST_12 and ST_13 that were missing)
   - Phase 4: Cross-verification and reporting
   
   Key requirements: 1:1 ladder conversion preserving original logic, LS-specific commands (GET/DST/ORG/PRS/CLR/EMG) converted to PLCopen MC_ function blocks, missing spring 0.15/0.23 blocks created from scratch, alarm code mapping completed.

   User also requested: cleanup of old/unnecessary files, web verification of XBF-PD02A/XBF-AD04A module compatibility with XEC, and a final re-verification pass.

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - LS Electric PLC migration: XBC-DN64H → XEC-DN64H
   - IEC 61131-3 Structured Text (ST) programming
   - PLCopen MC_ function blocks (MC_MoveAbsolute, MC_Home, MC_SetPosition, MC_Reset, MC_Stop, MC_Jog)
   - LS PLC addressing: P (physical I/O), M (internal relay), K (HMI), T (timer), D (data register), U (special module)
   - XEC AT% addressing format: `%IX[slot].[byte].[bit]` (32-point modules split into byte0 bits0-15 + byte1 bits0-15)
   - XBC-specific commands: GET, DST, ORG, PRS, CLR, EMG, THP, PUTP, GMOVP, DECO
   - TON timer conversion: XBC 10ms base units → XEC T# time literals
   - XEC built-in 2-axis positioning (1~2,000,000 pps) — replaces XBF-PD02A module
   - XBF-AD04A analog module: compatible with XEC (4ch, 12bit, 0~4000)
   - Panasonic MINAS A6 servo drive (1-axis index rotation table)
   - Step sequence pattern using DECO instruction → CASE statement conversion

3. Files and Code Sections:

   **Project Root**: `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\SHINJIN\1 CELL 조립 장비\`

   - `1CELL_PLC_분석보고서.md` — Master reference document with ALL I/O mappings (P, M, K, T, D, U areas), ~1846 variables, 11-slot hardware config, servo control sequences. Used as source of truth for all GVL and documentation generation.

   - `ST/Ladder_text.txt` (13,090 lines, 108 pages) — Original ladder program text extracted from XG5000 PDF. Contains all 17 program blocks. Used as primary source for ST conversion since Ladder_RAW.pdf had Korean character extraction issues.

   **PLC RAW/blocks/** — 17 split block files:
   ```
   01_MAIN.txt (1027 lines), 02_HMI.txt (910), 03_INPUT.txt (898), 
   04_OUTPUT.txt (567), 05_ALARM.txt (1394), 06_SERVO.txt (417),
   10_제품투입배출.txt (278), 11_플런저.txt (827), 
   12_스프링015.txt (794), 13_스프링023.txt (759),
   14_댐퍼.txt (809), 15_구리스도포.txt (667), 16_코어.txt (1011),
   17_프레임.txt (970), 18_작동력검사.txt (770), 
   19_통전검사.txt (230), 20_불량배출.txt (532)
   ```

   **PLC RAW/ST_XEC/** — 22 generated files:
   - GVL files (5): `GVL_IO.st` (27KB, 254 vars), `GVL_INTERNAL.st` (8KB, 99 vars), `GVL_DATA.st` (15KB, 201 vars), `GVL_TIMER.st` (13KB, 178 vars), `GVL_HMI.st` (7KB, 97 vars)
   - System ST (6): `ST_01_MAIN.st` (892 lines), `ST_02_HMI.st` (370), `ST_03_INPUT.st` (782), `ST_04_OUTPUT.st` (454), `ST_05_ALARM.st` (880), `ST_06_SERVO.st` (617)
   - Station ST (11): `ST_10_제품투입배출.st` (406), `ST_11_플런저.st` (1006), `ST_12_스프링015.st` (963, NEW), `ST_13_스프링023.st` (924, NEW), `ST_14_댐퍼.st` (1057), `ST_15_구리스도포.st` (682), `ST_16_코어.st` (935), `ST_17_프레임.st` (927), `ST_18_작동력검사.st` (760), `ST_19_통전검사.st` (287), `ST_20_불량배출.st` (546)

   **PLC RAW/ documentation (3+1):**
   - `XBC_to_XEC_변환가이드.md` — Hardware mapping, address conversion rules (updated with byte.bit format), LS command → MC_ FB table, task config. Updated multiple times to reflect XBF-PD02A removal, correct AT% format, U09 system variable replacement.
   - `IO_할당표.md` — 227-point I/O mapping table. Added warning note about flat-bit vs byte.bit address format discrepancy with GVL_IO.st.
   - `프로그램_구조도.md` — 17 block structure, Task0/1/2 assignments, variable area summary.
   - `검증_리포트.md` — Cross-verification results.

   **Key ST_06_SERVO.st MC_ FB conversion pattern:**
   ```pascal
   // XBC: DST(09, 0, D05302, D05402, 0, 0, h0010)
   FB_MoveIdx(
     Execute   := M00103,
     Axis      := Axis_Index,
     Position  := DINT_TO_REAL(D05302),
     Velocity  := DINT_TO_REAL(D05402),
     Direction := mcPositiveDirection
   );
   ```

   **Key ST_12 spring block structure (NEW):**
   - Main: Initial position check M02310,M02312,M02314,M02316,M02923 → M02000
   - DECO D00200 → M0201x (init step, 4-bit), D00220 → M0220x (auto step)
   - Init steps 1-9 with TON T0211~T0219
   - Auto steps 1-15 with TON T0220~T0236
   - Vision check: P00084(OK)→M04813, P00085(NG)→M04814
   - Supply counter: INCP D00150

   **Fixes applied to ST_05_ALARM.st header:**
   ```
   (* Spring-0.15: T0250~T0257 (8 timers). Only T0256→264, T0257→265 output to D00189 *)
   (* Spring-0.23: T0350~T0357 (8 timers). Only T0356→210, T0357→211 output to D00189 *)
   (* Remaining timers (T0250~T0255, T0350~T0355) contribute to M00172/M00173 flag only *)
   ```

   **Fix applied to ST_06_SERVO.st:** Renamed `U09_01_0_prev` → `bJogCW_prev` (replace_all)

   **Deleted files/folders:**
   - `ST/` (old incomplete ST conversion, 15 files + blocks/)
   - `ST FINAL/` (previous attempt with final_xec/, fixed_xbc/, ladder_images/, ladder_text/)
   - `XEC ST/` (previous XEC conversion with converted/, helpers/)
   - `Ladder_ST.pdf`, `Ladder_ST_FINAL.pdf`, `Ladder_XEC_ST.pdf` (old conversion PDFs)
   - `~tmp26512/` (XG5000 temp directory)
   - Desktop temp files: `Ladder_RAW_extracted.txt`, `LADDER_STRUCTURE_SUMMARY.txt`

4. Errors and fixes:
   - **PDF text extraction Korean character loss**: Ladder_RAW.pdf extracted via pdfminer lost Korean characters. Fixed by using existing Ladder_text.txt (from previous correct extraction) as the source.
   - **pdftoppm not available**: Direct PDF page reading failed because pdftoppm was not installed. Worked around by using doc-reader agent with pdfminer.
   - **AT% address format error (HIGH)**: IO_할당표.md and 변환가이드.md used flat bit numbering (%IX0.0.16) but XEC uses byte.bit format (%IX0.1.0). Fixed 변환가이드 conversion examples; added prominent warning to IO_할당표.md pointing to GVL_IO.st as authoritative source.
   - **U09 slot references after removal**: After confirming XBF-PD02A is XBC-only and should be removed, documents still referenced %IX0.9.x physical addresses. Fixed by replacing U09 table with XEC system variable references (_MC_AX[0].bReady etc).
   - **Misleading alarm header comments**: ST_05_ALARM.st header said "T0250~T0255 (6 channels)" implying all output to D00189, but only T0256/T0257 do. Fixed comment to clarify.
   - **Obsolete variable names**: ST_06_SERVO.st had `U09_01_0` variable names referencing removed physical module. Started renaming to `bJogCW`/`bJogCCW`.

5. Problem Solving:
   - Solved the missing spring block problem: ST_12_스프링015.st and ST_13_스프링023.st were completely absent from previous conversions. Created from scratch using ladder block text (794 and 759 lines respectively → 963 and 924 line ST files).
   - Solved servo command conversion: All 7 LS-specific commands (GET/DST/ORG/PRS/CLR/EMG/THP) fully converted to PLCopen MC_ function blocks.
   - Solved alarm code gap: Verified 83 alarm code assignments in ST_05_ALARM.st match ladder exactly.
   - Confirmed hardware compatibility: XBF-PD02A incompatible (use XEC built-in), XBF-AD04A compatible (keep).
   - Identified and partially fixed AT% addressing discrepancy between documentation and code.
   - Two verification agents (servo/spring cross-verify and GVL completeness) were still running at time of summary request.

6. All user messages:
   - "Implement the following plan: # 1 CELL 조립 장비 — XBC-DN64H 래더 → XEC-DN64H ST 변환 플랜 [detailed multi-phase plan]"
   - "Ladder_RAW 파일"
   - "있잖어"
   - "텍스트 변환 기능은 없고 Ladder_RAW.pdf 이용해서 파실해야함"
   - "ㅇㅇ" (approval for cleanup)
   - "| 09 | XBF-PD02A | XDL-L7NH (또는 XBF-PD02A) | 위치결정 모듈 — XEC 호환성 확인 필요 | ... - 이거 확인해봐 웹 검색"
   - "예전 파일및 필요없는것들은 제거"
   - "추가 확인할거 없는지 다시 한번 검증"

7. Pending Tasks:
   - **U09_01_1 rename**: Only U09_01_0 was renamed to bJogCW in ST_06_SERVO.st. U09_01_1 → bJogCCW rename not yet done.
   - **2 verification agents still running**: Servo/spring cross-verify agent and GVL completeness agent results not yet received.
   - **IO_할당표.md full address correction**: Only a warning note was added; the actual 200+ row table still uses flat-bit format. May need full rewrite if user wants actual XEC addresses in the table.
   - **TODO items from ST conversion** (4 critical, on-site verification needed):
     1. `_MC_AX[0]` axis name → match actual XEC configuration
     2. AT% addresses → verify after hardware setup
     3. U0A special module → verify XEC system variable names
     4. Timer base unit → XBC 10ms vs XEC ms verification

8. Current Work:
   Was performing final re-verification fixes based on the docs/alarm verification agent results. Specifically:
   - Fixed 변환가이드.md: AT% conversion examples, U09 table, naming rules
   - Added warning to IO_할당표.md about address format
   - Fixed ST_05_ALARM.st header comments
   - Started renaming U09 variables in ST_06_SERVO.st (U09_01_0 → bJogCW_prev done, U09_01_1 not yet done)
   - Still waiting for 2 remaining verification agents to complete

9. Optional Next Step:
   Complete the U09_01_1 → bJogCCW rename in ST_06_SERVO.st, then wait for the 2 remaining verification agents (servo/spring cross-verify and GVL completeness) to return results. Based on the user's request "추가 확인할거 없는지 다시 한번 검증", apply any additional fixes those agents identify and provide a final consolidated verification report.

If you need specific details from before compaction (like exact code snippets, error messages, or content you generated), read the full transcript at: C:\Users\Administrator\.claude\projects\C--Users-Administrator-Desktop\77b3163c-5aae-4d29-9fc8-4f4c4828be04.jsonl
Continue the conversation from where it left off without asking the user any further questions. Resume directly — do not acknowledge the summary, do not recap what was happening, do not preface with "I'll continue" or similar. Pick up the last task as if the break never happened.

(* ============================================================ *)
(* PROGRAM: ST_06_SERVO                                        *)
(* DESC:    Servo 1-axis position control (index rotation)     *)
(*          Slot 9, Axis 0 — 12-station 30-degree index        *)
(*          Home return, standby position, jog, alarm handling *)
(* SOURCE:  06_SERVO.txt (XG5000 mnemonic — LS PLC XG5000)    *)
(* TARGET:  XEC IEC 61131-3 Structured Text + MC_ FB           *)
(* DATE:    2026-03-16                                         *)
(* ============================================================ *)
(*                                                              *)
(* LS PLC -> XEC MC_ function block mapping:                   *)
(*   GET(9,h0140,D05000,2) -> read _MC_AX[0].Status etc.       *)
(*   DST(9,0,pos,speed,0,0,h0010) -> MC_MoveAbsolute           *)
(*   ORG(9,0) -> MC_Home                                       *)
(*   PRS(9,0,0) -> MC_SetPosition                              *)
(*   CLR(9,0,1) -> MC_Reset                                    *)
(*   EMG(9,0) -> MC_Stop (with EmergencyStop mode)             *)
(*   THP(9,0,D05052,10/11) -> MC_Jog (with velocity)          *)
(*                                                              *)
(* XEC system variable prefix: _MC_AX[0].                      *)
(*   .Status       -> D05000 word (axis status bits)           *)
(*   .IsHomed      -> D05000.4 (origin complete)               *)
(*   .Error        -> D05000.1 (axis error)                    *)
(*   .IsMoving     -> D05000.0 (motion active)                 *)
(*   .InPosition   -> D05000.2 (position complete)             *)
(*   .ExtIO        -> D05002  (external I/O word)              *)
(*   .ActualPosition -> D05004 DWORD (current position)        *)
(*   .ActualVelocity -> D05006 DWORD (current speed)           *)
(*   .ErrorID      -> D05008 (error code)                      *)
(* ============================================================ *)

PROGRAM ST_06_SERVO

VAR
    (* -------------------------------------------------------- *)
    (* MC_ function block instances                             *)
    (* -------------------------------------------------------- *)
    FB_Home        : MC_Home;           (* ORG -> home return *)
    FB_MoveAbs     : MC_MoveAbsolute;   (* DST -> standby position move *)
    FB_MoveIdx     : MC_MoveAbsolute;   (* DST -> index 30-degree rotation *)
    FB_SetPos      : MC_SetPosition;    (* PRS -> position preset to 0 *)
    FB_Reset       : MC_Reset;          (* CLR -> alarm clear *)
    FB_Stop        : MC_Stop;           (* EMG -> emergency stop *)
    FB_JogCW       : MC_Jog;            (* THP+dir10 -> CW jog *)
    FB_JogCCW      : MC_Jog;            (* THP+dir11 -> CCW jog *)

    (* -------------------------------------------------------- *)
    (* timers (same numbering as original ladder)               *)
    (* -------------------------------------------------------- *)
    TON_T0006  : TON;   (* index rotation timeout alarm 40ms *)
    TON_T0007  : TON;   (* servo in-position NG check 5ms *)
    TON_T0008  : TON;   (* position complete while not in-pos 5ms *)
    TON_T0009  : TON;   (* standby move trigger delay 2ms *)
    TON_T0012  : TON;   (* dry-run pulse 4ms *)
    TON_T0050  : TON;   (* index complete delay 1 — 30ms *)
    TON_T0051  : TON;   (* index complete delay 2 — 20ms *)
    TON_T0082  : TON;   (* home command delay 10ms *)
    TON_T0083  : TON;   (* home command execute delay 11ms *)

    (* -------------------------------------------------------- *)
    (* FB execute one-shot flags                                *)
    (* -------------------------------------------------------- *)
    bHomeExec      : BOOL := FALSE;
    bMovAbsExec    : BOOL := FALSE;
    bMovIdxExec    : BOOL := FALSE;
    bSetPosExec    : BOOL := FALSE;
    bResetExec     : BOOL := FALSE;
    bStopExec      : BOOL := FALSE;
    bJogCWExec     : BOOL := FALSE;
    bJogCCWExec    : BOOL := FALSE;

    (* -------------------------------------------------------- *)
    (* edge detection previous values                           *)
    (* -------------------------------------------------------- *)
    M0001B_prev    : BOOL := FALSE;   (* servo rotation pulse *)
    M0001C_prev    : BOOL := FALSE;   (* position reset request *)
    M0001F_prev    : BOOL := FALSE;   (* system reset *)
    M00030_prev    : BOOL := FALSE;   (* EMO *)
    M00102_prev    : BOOL := FALSE;   (* standby move command *)
    M00103_prev    : BOOL := FALSE;   (* index rotation command *)
    M0011F_prev    : BOOL := FALSE;   (* servo not homed *)
    K00116_prev    : BOOL := FALSE;   (* home touch *)
    K00118_prev    : BOOL := FALSE;   (* manual index touch *)
    T0083_prev     : BOOL := FALSE;   (* home execute delay Q *)
    D05000_2_prev  : BOOL := FALSE;   (* InPosition rising *)
    D05000_4_prev  : BOOL := FALSE;   (* IsHomed rising *)
    bJogCW_prev  : BOOL := FALSE;   (* CW jog rising *)
    U09_01_1_prev  : BOOL := FALSE;   (* CCW jog rising *)
END_VAR


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 0: servo rotation interlock — all units ready check    *)
(* Various unit completion bits -> overall interlock           *)
(* M01316, M0131A, M02316, M03316, M04314, M04316             *)
(* M05310, M06314, M0631A, M0631C, M06320                     *)
(* M07316, M0731A, M0731C, M07322                             *)
(* AND M00311(nest clamp fwd) AND M08003 AND M08316            *)
(* AND M00315(conduction OK) AND M01987(module OK)             *)
(* -> M00150 (servo rotation allowed flag)                     *)
(* ============================================================ *)
M00150 := (M01316 OR M0131A)
        AND (M02316 OR M02316)
        AND (M03316 OR M03316)
        AND (M04314 OR M04316)
        AND (M05310 OR M05310)
        AND (M06314 OR M0631A OR M0631C OR M06320)
        AND (M07316 OR M0731A OR M0731C OR M07322)
        AND M00311    (* nest clamp advanced *)
        AND M08003
        AND M08316
        AND M00315    (* conduction test OK *)
        AND M01987;   (* special module OK *)


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 30: servo rotation enable condition (M00050)           *)
(* P0000F(area sensor) AND M00150 AND M01987 AND M00320(dry)   *)
(* ============================================================ *)
M00050 := P0000F AND M00150 AND M01987 AND M00320;


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 38: servo rotation pulse rising edge -> SET M00051     *)
(* M0001B P (rising) -> M00051                                 *)
(* ============================================================ *)
IF M0001B AND NOT M0001B_prev THEN
    M00051 := TRUE;   (* servo rotation trigger *)
END_IF;


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 41: servo motion active flag (M00053)                  *)
(* D05000.0 (_MC_AX[0].IsMoving) -> M00053                    *)
(* ============================================================ *)
D05000_0 := _MC_AX[0].IsMoving;
M00053   := D05000_0;


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 43: position complete rising edge -> SET M00055        *)
(* D05000.2 (_MC_AX[0].InPosition) P -> SET M00055            *)
(* ============================================================ *)
D05000_2 := _MC_AX[0].InPosition;
IF D05000_2 AND NOT D05000_2_prev THEN
    M00055 := TRUE;   (* servo rotation complete SET *)
END_IF;


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 46: motion start -> RST M00055                         *)
(* D05000.0 (IsMoving) -> RST M00055                          *)
(* ============================================================ *)
IF D05000_0 THEN
    M00055 := FALSE;
END_IF;


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 48: servo ON lamp                                      *)
(* M00300 -> K0111A (HMI servo-ON lamp)                       *)
(* ============================================================ *)
K0111A := M00300;


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 50: home complete lamp                                  *)
(* M00101 OR D05001_5 -> K01116                               *)
(* D05001_5 = _MC_AX[0].IsHoming (in-progress)                *)
(* ============================================================ *)
D05000_1 := _MC_AX[0].Error;
D05000_4 := _MC_AX[0].IsHomed;
D05001_5 := _MC_AX[0].IsHoming;
K01116   := M00101 OR D05001_5;


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 55: index rotation lamp                                *)
(* D05000.0 (IsMoving) -> K01118                              *)
(* ============================================================ *)
K01118 := D05000_0;


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 57: dry-run pulse timer                                *)
(* M00307 AND M01987 AND NOT T0012 AND M00320 -> TON T0012 4ms*)
(* ============================================================ *)
TON_T0012(IN := M00307 AND M01987 AND NOT T0012 AND M00320, PT := T#4ms);
T0012 := TON_T0012.Q;


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 67: servo status read (GET -> XEC system variables)    *)
(* GET(9, h0140, D05000, 2) — axis status 2 words             *)
(* GET(9, h0143, D05002, 1) — external I/O 1 word             *)
(* GET(9, h0144, D05004, 2) — actual position DWORD           *)
(* GET(9, h0146, D05006, 2) — actual speed DWORD              *)
(* GET(9, h014A, D05008, 1) — error code 1 word               *)
(*                                                              *)
(* XEC: read directly from _MC_AX[0] system variables         *)
(* ============================================================ *)
(* Status word mirror — bit-decomposed for compatibility *)
D05000_0 := _MC_AX[0].IsMoving;       (* bit 0: motion active *)
D05000_1 := _MC_AX[0].Error;          (* bit 1: axis error *)
D05000_2 := _MC_AX[0].InPosition;     (* bit 2: position complete *)
D05000_4 := _MC_AX[0].IsHomed;        (* bit 4: origin complete *)
D05001_5 := _MC_AX[0].IsHoming;       (* status word2 bit5: homing *)

(* D05002: external I/O word — read from axis external I/O register *)
(* TODO: map _MC_AX[0] external I/O bits to D05002 if available *)

(* D05004: actual position DWORD (unit: 0.01 deg = 100 units/deg) *)
D05004 := LREAL_TO_DINT(_MC_AX[0].ActualPosition);

(* D05006: actual speed DWORD *)
D05006 := LREAL_TO_DINT(_MC_AX[0].ActualVelocity);

(* D05008: error code *)
D05008 := _MC_AX[0].ErrorID;

(* Scale actual position: /100 -> degrees (DDIV D05004/100->D05014) *)
D05014 := D05004 / 100;
IF D05014 < 0 THEN
    D05014 := 0;   (* clip negative (D> 0 D05014 -> DMOV 0 D05014) *)
END_IF;


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 98: position preset on M0001C rising edge              *)
(* M0001C P -> PRS(9,0,0) : MC_SetPosition to 0               *)
(* ============================================================ *)
IF M0001C AND NOT M0001C_prev THEN
    bSetPosExec := TRUE;
    M00900      := TRUE;   (* preset executing flag *)
END_IF;

FB_SetPos(
    Axis     := _MC_AX[0],
    Execute  := bSetPosExec,
    Position := 0.0,        (* preset current position to 0 *)
    Mode     := 0           (* absolute preset *)
);
IF FB_SetPos.Done OR FB_SetPos.Error THEN
    bSetPosExec := FALSE;
    M00900      := FALSE;
END_IF;

(* Rung 106: M00901 -> EPRS confirm (XEC: Done flag handles this) *)
M00901 := FB_SetPos.Done;


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 112: position >= 3600 (36 full turns) -> request reset *)
(* M00055 AND D05014>=3600 AND NOT M0001C AND NOT M00122       *)
(* ============================================================ *)
IF M00055 AND (D05014 >= 3600) AND NOT M0001C AND NOT M00122 THEN
    M0001C := TRUE;
ELSE
    M0001C := FALSE;
END_IF;


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 119: servo not-homed flag                              *)
(* D05000.1 (Error) -> M0011F                                  *)
(* NOTE: in XEC, axis error bit replaces LS "origin incomplete"*)
(* ============================================================ *)
M0011F := D05000_1;   (* servo not homed / axis error *)


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 123: home return sequence                              *)
(* Condition: NOT M00302 AND NOT M00101 AND M00300 AND M00050  *)
(*            AND M0011F AND NOT D05000_0                      *)
(*            AND K00116 rising edge                            *)
(* -> SET M00100, then trigger MC_Home                         *)
(* ============================================================ *)
IF NOT M00302 AND NOT M00101 AND M00300 AND M00050
   AND M0011F AND NOT D05000_0 THEN
    IF K00116 AND NOT K00116_prev THEN
        M00100 := TRUE;   (* home return start SET *)
    END_IF;
END_IF;

(* alternate: K00116 rising alone also available *)
IF K00116 AND NOT K00116_prev THEN
    ;   (* already handled above *)
END_IF;


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 135: home return execute via T0082/T0083 delay         *)
(* M00100 -> TON T0082 10ms, TON T0083 11ms                   *)
(* T0083 rising edge -> ORG(9,0) : MC_Home Execute             *)
(* RST M00100                                                  *)
(* ============================================================ *)
TON_T0082(IN := M00100, PT := T#10ms);
T0082 := TON_T0082.Q;

TON_T0083(IN := M00100, PT := T#11ms);
T0083 := TON_T0083.Q;

IF T0083 AND NOT T0083_prev THEN
    bHomeExec := TRUE;    (* trigger MC_Home — ORG(9,0) *)
    M00100    := FALSE;   (* clear home request *)
END_IF;

(* MC_Home function block call — replaces ORG(9,0) *)
FB_Home(
    Axis        := _MC_AX[0],
    Execute     := bHomeExec,
    HomingMode  := 0        (* homing mode: use axis parameter default *)
);
IF FB_Home.Done THEN
    bHomeExec := FALSE;
    D05000_4  := TRUE;    (* force IsHomed reflect *)
END_IF;
IF FB_Home.Error THEN
    bHomeExec := FALSE;
    M00301    := TRUE;    (* home error flag *)
END_IF;


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 146: home complete confirmation                         *)
(* D05000.4 (IsHomed) rising -> SET M00300, SET M00101        *)
(* D05000.1 (Error) -> RST M00101                              *)
(* ============================================================ *)
IF D05000_4 AND NOT D05000_4_prev THEN
    M00300 := TRUE;    (* servo ON confirm *)
    M00101 := TRUE;    (* home complete SET *)
END_IF;

IF D05000_1 THEN
    M00101 := FALSE;   (* axis error -> home incomplete *)
END_IF;


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 156: servo jog operation                               *)
(* K00190 AND NOT M00030 AND M00050 -> U09.01.0 (CW jog)      *)
(* K00191 AND NOT M00030 AND M00050 -> U09.01.1 (CCW jog)     *)
(* AND NOT M00100 AND NOT T0082 (not during home sequence)     *)
(* ============================================================ *)
bJogCWExec  := K00190 AND NOT M00030 AND M00050
               AND NOT M00100 AND NOT T0082;
bJogCCWExec := K00191 AND NOT M00030 AND M00050
               AND NOT M00100 AND NOT T0082;

U09_01_0 := bJogCWExec;    (* CW jog status mirror -> HMI lamp *)
U09_01_1 := bJogCCWExec;   (* CCW jog status mirror -> HMI lamp *)

(* Rung 167: jog HMI lamps *)
K01190 := U09_01_0;
K01191 := U09_01_1;

(* Rung 172: THP -> set jog speed on rising edge of jog start *)
(* THP(9,0,D05052,10) CW jog speed set                       *)
(* THP(9,0,D05052,11) CCW jog speed set                      *)
(* XEC: MC_Jog uses Velocity parameter directly               *)

(* MC_Jog CW — replaces THP(9,0,D05052,10) + U09.01.0 *)
FB_JogCW(
    Axis      := _MC_AX[0],
    JogForward := bJogCWExec,
    JogBackward := FALSE,
    Velocity  := DINT_TO_LREAL(D05052)   (* D05052 = jog speed in unit *)
);

(* MC_Jog CCW — replaces THP(9,0,D05052,11) + U09.01.1 *)
FB_JogCCW(
    Axis      := _MC_AX[0],
    JogForward := FALSE,
    JogBackward := bJogCCWExec,
    Velocity  := DINT_TO_LREAL(D05052)
);


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 187: standby position move                             *)
(* Condition: NOT M00302 AND M00101 AND M00050                 *)
(*            AND NOT M00122(not yet at standby)               *)
(*            AND NOT M00102(not already moving)               *)
(* -> TON T0009 2ms -> trigger MC_MoveAbsolute (standby)      *)
(* ============================================================ *)
TON_T0009(IN := NOT M00302 AND M00101 AND M00050
               AND NOT M00122 AND NOT M00102,
          PT := T#2ms);
T0009 := TON_T0009.Q;

(* Rung 197: T0009 Q -> SET M00102, then execute DST *)
IF T0009 AND NOT M00102 THEN
    M00102 := TRUE;
END_IF;

IF M00102 AND NOT M00102_prev
   AND NOT D05000_0 AND NOT D05000_1 THEN
    bMovAbsExec := TRUE;   (* DST(9,0,D05300,D05400,0,0,h0010) *)
END_IF;

(* MC_MoveAbsolute — replaces DST(9,0,D05300,D05400,0,0,h0010) *)
(* D05300 = standby position (DINT), D05400 = standby speed    *)
FB_MoveAbs(
    Axis         := _MC_AX[0],
    Execute      := bMovAbsExec,
    Position     := DINT_TO_LREAL(D05300),   (* standby position *)
    Velocity     := DINT_TO_LREAL(D05400),   (* standby speed *)
    Acceleration := 0.0,
    Deceleration := 0.0,
    Direction    := MC_Positive_Direction     (* h0010 = positive direction *)
);
IF FB_MoveAbs.Done OR FB_MoveAbs.Error THEN
    bMovAbsExec := FALSE;
END_IF;

(* Rung 208: standby move in progress -> SET M00121 *)
IF M00102 THEN
    M00121 := TRUE;
END_IF;

(* Rung 210: standby reached -> RST M00121 *)
IF M00122 THEN
    M00121 := FALSE;
END_IF;

(* Rung 212: M00121 AND InPosition -> SET M00122 (standby reached) *)
IF M00121 AND D05000_2 THEN
    M00122 := TRUE;   (* standby position reached SET *)
END_IF;

(* Rung 215: standby reset conditions *)
IF NOT M00101 THEN
    M00122 := FALSE;   (* axis error or not homed -> clear standby *)
END_IF;
IF D05000_4 AND NOT D05000_4_prev THEN
    M00122 := FALSE;   (* after home complete -> require new standby move *)
END_IF;
IF T0083 THEN
    M00122 := FALSE;   (* home sequence started -> clear standby flag *)
END_IF;
IF NOT M00030 AND NOT F0009A THEN   (* EMO released *)
    M00122 := FALSE;
    M00102 := FALSE;   (* clear move command too *)
END_IF;

(* Clear M00102 when NOT M00300 OR axis error OR home in progress *)
IF D05000_4 AND NOT D05000_4_prev THEN
    M00102 := FALSE;
END_IF;


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 226: 12-station 30-degree index rotation               *)
(* Auto: M00010 AND M00122 AND M0001B rising AND M00050        *)
(*       AND NOT M00103 (not already rotating)                  *)
(* Manual: M00011 AND M00122 AND K00118 rising AND NOT T0051   *)
(* -> SET M00103, then execute DST(9,0,D05302,D05402,...)      *)
(* ============================================================ *)

(* Rung 226 auto index condition *)
IF M00010 AND M00122 AND M0001B AND NOT M0001B_prev
   AND M00050 AND NOT M00103 THEN
    M00103 := TRUE;   (* index rotation command SET *)
END_IF;

(* Rung 226 manual index via K00118 touch *)
IF M00011 AND M00122 AND K00118 AND NOT K00118_prev
   AND NOT T0051 THEN
    M00103 := TRUE;
END_IF;

(* Rung 239: M00103 rising -> DST(9,0,D05302,D05402,0,0,h0010) *)
IF M00103 AND NOT M00103_prev
   AND NOT D05000_0 AND NOT D05000_1
   AND NOT M00300 AND NOT T0006 THEN
    bMovIdxExec := TRUE;   (* index rotation move execute *)
END_IF;

(* MC_MoveAbsolute — replaces DST(9,0,D05302,D05402,0,0,h0010) *)
(* D05302 = index target position, D05402 = index rotation speed *)
FB_MoveIdx(
    Axis         := _MC_AX[0],
    Execute      := bMovIdxExec,
    Position     := DINT_TO_LREAL(D05302),   (* index rotation position *)
    Velocity     := DINT_TO_LREAL(D05402),   (* index rotation speed *)
    Acceleration := 0.0,
    Deceleration := 0.0,
    Direction    := MC_Positive_Direction     (* h0010 = positive direction *)
);
IF FB_MoveIdx.Done OR FB_MoveIdx.Error THEN
    bMovIdxExec := FALSE;
    M00103      := FALSE;   (* clear rotation command on complete *)
END_IF;


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 252: index rotation alarm timer                        *)
(* M00053(IsMoving) -> TON T0006 40ms (rotation timeout)      *)
(* P00056 AND M00010 -> TON T0007 5ms (in-position NG)        *)
(* D05000.2 AND P00056 AND M00010 -> TON T0008 5ms            *)
(* ============================================================ *)
TON_T0006(IN := M00053, PT := T#40ms);
T0006 := TON_T0006.Q;   (* rotation timeout alarm *)

TON_T0007(IN := P00056 AND M00010, PT := T#5ms);
T0007 := TON_T0007.Q;   (* servo in-position NG *)

(* Rung 259: position complete while P00056 sensor present *)
TON_T0008(IN := D05000_2 AND P00056 AND M00010, PT := T#5ms);
T0008 := TON_T0008.Q;


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 264: index complete delay chain                        *)
(* M00995 AND M00171 AND M00055 AND NOT T0051 -> TON T0050 30ms*)
(* T0050 -> TON T0051 20ms                                     *)
(* ============================================================ *)
TON_T0050(IN := M00995 AND M00171 AND M00055 AND NOT T0051, PT := T#30ms);
T0050 := TON_T0050.Q;

TON_T0051(IN := T0050, PT := T#20ms);
T0051 := TON_T0051.Q;


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 276: servo alarm clear (CLR -> MC_Reset)               *)
(* D05000.1(Error) AND M0001F(reset) -> CLR(9,0,1) : MC_Reset *)
(* ============================================================ *)
IF D05000_1 AND M0001F THEN
    bResetExec := TRUE;   (* CLR(9,0,1) -> MC_Reset *)
    M00301     := TRUE;
END_IF;

(* MC_Reset — replaces CLR(9,0,1) *)
FB_Reset(
    Axis    := _MC_AX[0],
    Execute := bResetExec
);
IF FB_Reset.Done OR FB_Reset.Error THEN
    bResetExec := FALSE;
    IF FB_Reset.Done THEN
        M00301 := FALSE;   (* reset complete *)
    END_IF;
END_IF;


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 283: emergency stop (EMG -> MC_Stop)                   *)
(* M00030(EMO) -> EMG(9,0) : MC_Stop                          *)
(* M0011F rising, T0007, T0008, M00005, NOT M00300 also stop  *)
(* ============================================================ *)
bStopExec := M00030
           OR (T0007)
           OR (T0008)
           OR (M0011F AND NOT M0011F_prev)
           OR (NOT M00300 AND M00005);

(* MC_Stop — replaces EMG(9,0) *)
FB_Stop(
    Axis         := _MC_AX[0],
    Execute      := bStopExec,
    Deceleration := 0.0,    (* use axis parameter default *)
    Jerk         := 0.0
);
(* After stop complete, clear bStopExec only if EMO released  *)
IF FB_Stop.Done AND NOT M00030 THEN
    bStopExec := FALSE;
END_IF;

(* T0007 or T0008 alarm -> set alarm bits *)
IF T0007 OR T0008 THEN
    M00005  := TRUE;    (* servo position alarm *)
    M00300  := FALSE;   (* servo ON cancel *)
END_IF;

(* EMO solenoid RST — safety interlock: nest clamp must also RST *)
IF M00030 THEN
    (* EMO active: ensure solenoid outputs are suppressed *)
    (* Individual unit SOL outputs already gated by M01987/M00010 *)
    ;
END_IF;


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Rung 293: servo parameter calculation (always executed)     *)
(* DMUL: D05050(touch) * 100 -> D05052 (jog speed pulse unit) *)
(* DMUL: D05100(touch) * 10  -> D05300 (standby position)     *)
(* DMUL: D05200(touch) * 100 -> D05400 (standby speed)        *)
(* DMUL: D05102(touch) * 1000 -> D05302 (index position)      *)
(* DMUL: D05202(touch) * 100  -> D05402 (index speed)         *)
(* ============================================================ *)
D05052 := D05050 * 100;    (* jog speed: touch input * 100 -> pulse/sec *)
D05300 := D05100 * 10;     (* standby position: touch * 10 -> units *)
D05400 := D05200 * 100;    (* standby speed: touch * 100 -> units/sec *)
D05302 := D05102 * 1000;   (* index position: touch * 1000 -> units *)
D05402 := D05202 * 100;    (* index speed: touch * 100 -> units/sec *)


(* ============================================================ *)
(* Edge detection update — must be last in scan               *)
(* ============================================================ *)
M0001B_prev   := M0001B;
M0001C_prev   := M0001C;
M0001F_prev   := M0001F;
M00030_prev   := M00030;
M00102_prev   := M00102;
M00103_prev   := M00103;
M0011F_prev   := M0011F;
K00116_prev   := K00116;
K00118_prev   := K00118;
T0083_prev    := T0083;
D05000_2_prev := D05000_2;
D05000_4_prev := D05000_4;
bJogCW_prev := U09_01_0;
U09_01_1_prev := U09_01_1;

END_PROGRAM

lines: bJogCW_prev  : BOOL := FALSE;   (* CW jog rising *)
-    U09_01_1_prev  : BOOL := FALSE;   (* CCW jog rising *)
+    bJogCCW_prev  : BOOL := FALSE;   (* CCW jog rising *)

# GVL 교차검증 보고서

분석일: 2026-03-16
대상 파일: GVL_IO.st, GVL_INTERNAL.st, GVL_DATA.st, GVL_TIMER.st, GVL_HMI.st

---

## 1. GVL_IO.st — P영역 I/O 선언 검증

### 1.1 AT% 주소 계산 방식 — 구조적 오류

**오류 분류: 심각 (컴파일/동작 불일치)**

GVL_IO.st는 P 주소를 `%IX[슬롯].[바이트].[비트]` 형식으로 변환할 때, **비트 인덱스를 0~15로 연장**하여 사용한다. 이는 IEC 61131-3 표준에서 비트 인덱스 최대값이 7임을 위반한다.

구체적인 오류 패턴:

| GVL 선언 | P주소 | 올바른 AT% | 비고 |
|---------|-------|----------|------|
| `AT %IX0.0.8` | P00008 | `%IX0.1.0` | 비트 8 = byte+1, bit 0 |
| `AT %IX0.0.9` | P00009 | `%IX0.1.1` | |
| `AT %IX0.0.10` | P0000A | `%IX0.1.2` | |
| `AT %IX0.0.11` | P0000B | `%IX0.1.3` | |
| `AT %IX0.0.12` | P0000C | `%IX0.1.4` | |
| `AT %IX0.0.13` | P0000D | `%IX0.1.5` | |
| `AT %IX0.0.15` | P0000F | `%IX0.1.7` | |
| `AT %IX0.1.8` | P00018 | `%IX0.2.0` | 동일 패턴 반복 |
| `AT %QX0.0.8` | P00028 | `%QX0.1.0` | 출력도 동일 문제 |

이 패턴이 **전체 106개 AT% 선언에 걸쳐 일관되게** 적용되어 있다. LS XEC-DN64H가 XG5000 스타일의 16비트 워드 단위 비트 인덱스를 수용한다면 실제 하드웨어에서 동작할 수 있으나, 이식성 및 표준 준수 면에서 수정이 필요하다. **XEC 컴파일러의 허용 여부를 XG5000에서 반드시 검증해야 한다.**

### 1.2 슬롯 할당 — P00020~P0003F 범위

GVL_IO.st는 P00020~P0003F(서보/LED/타워램프/피더)를 `%QX0.x.x`(슬롯 0)으로 매핑한다. 분석보고서에서 이 주소들은 섹션 3.3/3.4에 "P000xx" 범위로 기재되어 있다. 물리 배선상 I/O 모듈 배치가 이를 지지하는지 **실제 XG5000 하드웨어 구성에서 확인 필요**하다. 만약 출력 모듈이 별도 슬롯에 배치된다면 슬롯 번호가 틀린다.

### 1.3 분석보고서 대비 누락 항목 — 없음

섹션 3.1~3.10 (입력), 4.1~4.6 (출력)의 모든 P 주소가 GVL_IO.st에 선언되어 있다. 누락 항목 없음.

---

## 2. GVL_INTERNAL.st — M영역 선언 검증

### 2.1 분석보고서 섹션 5.1~5.7 대비 — 모두 선언됨

보고서에 명시된 섹션 5.1~5.7의 모든 M 비트가 선언되어 있다. 다만 보고서에 없는 부가 비트들(M00070~M00075 사이클정지, M00100~M00122 서보 원점, M00320 드라이런)이 GVL에 추가되어 있으며, 이는 적절하다.

**GVL에 선언되었지만 ST 코드에서 전혀 사용되지 않는 M 비트:**

| 주소 | 설명 | 비고 |
|------|------|------|
| M00014 | 자동 운전 정지 기억 | GVL 선언, ST 미사용 |
| M00025 | 서보 레디 | GVL 선언, ST 미사용 (보고서에는 있음) |
| M0111A | 통전 자재없음 | GVL 선언, ST 미사용 |

### 2.2 ST 코드에서 사용하지만 GVL_INTERNAL에 선언되지 않은 M 비트 — **총 1,149개**

이것이 가장 큰 문제다. GVL_INTERNAL.st는 보고서 섹션 5에 나열된 최소한의 "대표" 비트만 선언하고, 실제 ST 프로그램이 사용하는 대량의 내부 작업 비트들이 누락되어 있다.

**누락된 주요 그룹 (선별):**

| 범위 | 수량 | 용도 추정 |
|------|------|---------|
| M00005, M00029, M0002F | 3 | 시스템 제어 보조 비트 |
| M00039, M00040, M00042 | 3 | 통전/아날로그 제어 보조 |
| M00076~M0007C | 4 | 사이클정지 확장 (M00070~M00075 이후) |
| M00090~M00093 | 4 | HMI 화면 비교 보조 비트 |
| M00121, M0011F, M00131, M0013A | 4 | 서보 위치결정 보조 |
| M00150, M00300~M00317 | 20+ | 미식별 제어 비트 |
| M00814, M00820 | 2 | 검사/작동력 보조 |
| M00900~M00901, M00994~M00995 | 4 | 불량배출 보조 |
| M01000~M01019 | 16 | 공통 시퀀스 보조 비트 블록 |
| M01120~M01125 | 6 | 자재없음 확장 |
| M01200~M01229, M01250 | 47 | 플런저 시퀀스 내부 상태 비트 |
| M01300~M0131B | 28 | 스프링0.15 시퀀스 내부 상태 비트 |
| M01410~M01471 | 98 | 스프링0.23 시퀀스 내부 상태 비트 |
| M01510~M01521 | 34 | 체크댐퍼 시퀀스 내부 상태 비트 |
| M01910~M0198D | 62 | 구리스도포 시퀀스 내부 상태 비트 |
| M02000~M02019 | 26 | 공통 제어 비트 블록 |
| M02200~M0220F | 16 | 코어 시퀀스 비트 |
| M02300~M02319 | 22 | 코어 확장 |
| M02410~M02523 | 100+ | 프레임 시퀀스 내부 비트 |
| M02804~M02810 | 14 | 작동력검사 내부 비트 |
| M02910~M02923 | 20 | 불량배출 내부 비트 |
| M03000~M09917 | ~900 | 각 유닛 알람/시퀀스/서브스텝 비트 전체 |

**결론:** GVL_INTERNAL.st는 보고서의 "요약 수준" 비트만 커버하며, 실제 ST 프로그램이 생성하는 유닛별 내부 상태 비트(시퀀스 스텝 완료, 알람 로컬, 서브루틴 신호 등) 수천 개가 전혀 선언되지 않았다. 이 비트들은 컴파일 시 미선언 변수 오류가 발생한다.

**패턴 분석:** TACT LOG는 D07300, D07301 쌍으로 사용되는데 GVL은 D07300만 선언함. D07xxx+1 주소가 모두 누락. 또한 각 유닛별 스텝 레지스터(D00300, D00400, D00600, D00700, D00800, D00900)가 보고서에 없어 GVL에도 빠짐.

## 4. GVL_TIMER.st — T영역 선언 검증

### 4.1 분석보고서 섹션 8.1~8.2 범위 커버 — 부분적

보고서에 명시된 범위 경계(T0100~T0181, T0200~T0299 등)는 커버하나, 범위 내 **개별 타이머를 선별적으로만 선언**했다.

### 4.2 ST 코드에서 사용하지만 GVL_TIMER에 없는 타이머 — **275개**

**패턴 분석:** GVL_TIMER은 각 유닛에서 처음 몇 개(반자동, 알람 1~3, 딜레이 1~10)와 범위 끝 타이머만 선언하고, 중간 구간의 실제 사용 타이머를 대부분 누락했다.

## 5. GVL_HMI.st — K영역 선언 검증

### 5.1 분석보고서 섹션 6.1~6.4 대비 — 대부분 선언됨

보고서에 명시된 K 주소 전체가 선언되어 있다.

### 5.2 ST 코드에서 사용하지만 GVL_HMI에 없는 K 비트 — **3개**

| K01521 | 터치 램프 추가 | 보고서 미기재 |

### 5.3 GVL에 선언되었지만 ST에서 미사용인 K 비트

|------|------|

## 6. 총괄 요약

| GVL 파일 | 심각도 | 주요 문제 |
|---------|------|---------|
| GVL_IO.st | 중 | AT% 비트인덱스 8~15 사용 (IEC 표준 위반, 106개 선언 전체에 걸침). 하드웨어 검증 필요 |
| GVL_INTERNAL.st | **긴급** | 보고서 요약 비트 90개만 선언, ST 코드 실사용 M 비트 중 **1,149개 누락**. 컴파일 불가 |
| GVL_DATA.st | 높음 | D 레지스터 51개 누락 (단계 레지스터, TACT LOG 쌍, 딜레이 중간값) |
| GVL_TIMER.st | 높음 | 타이머 275개 누락 (각 유닛 중간 구간 전체) |
| GVL_HMI.st | 낮음 | K 비트 3개 누락 (K00185, K01520, K01521) |

### 즉시 조치 필요 사항

1. **GVL_INTERNAL.st** — ST 프로그램 파일별로 실제 사용 M 비트를 추출하여 전량 추가 선언해야 한다. 현재 상태로는 컴파일이 불가하다.

2. **GVL_TIMER.st** — 각 유닛 타이머 범위 전체를 배열(`ARRAY[0..n] OF TON`)로 선언하거나, 실제 사용 번호를 전량 선언해야 한다.

3. **GVL_DATA.st** — 누락된 51개 레지스터를 추가한다. 특히 단위 스텝 레지스터(D00300, D00400, D00600, D00700, D00800, D00900)와 TACT LOG 쌍(D07301, D07321 등)이 우선순위다.

4. **GVL_IO.st AT%** — LS XEC-DN64H가 비트 인덱스 8~15를 허용하는지 XG5000에서 검증한 후, 불허 시 표준 2바이트 분리 형식(`%IX0.1.0` 등)으로 전면 수정한다.

5. **GVL_HMI.st** — K00185, K01520, K01521을 추가 선언한다.
